name: golang-github-jackc-pgx-v4-dev
title: golang-github-jackc-pgx-v4-dev
summary: PostgreSQL driver and toolkit for Golang
description:
PostgreSQL driver and toolkit for Golang
Pure Golang driver and toolkit for PostgreSQL. The driver part of pgx is
compatible with database/sql but also offers a native interface similar in
style to database/sql that offers better performance and more features.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jackc-pgx-v4-dev because PostgreSQL driver and toolkit for Golang.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jackc-pgx-v4-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jackc-pgx-v4-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jackc-pgx-v4-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
